title: README claims Gin framework but code uses stdlib net/http
evidence: README.md:3 says 'built with Go, Gin framework, and SQLite' but app.go:8 imports net/http and app.go:183-185 uses http.HandleFunc — no Gin dependency in go.mod
suggestion: Correct the README to state the standard library net/http router is used

title: Handlers registered on global http.DefaultServeMux
evidence: app.go:183-185 calls http.HandleFunc on the default mux inside startServer(); multiple Server instances would collide, though tests bypass this by calling handlers directly
suggestion: Use a dedicated http.ServeMux per Server for isolation

title: Test coverage exceeds the 3-test minimum with edge cases
evidence: app_test.go defines 15 test functions plus table subtests covering not-found, invalid-id, empty-list, method-not-allowed, and update validation
